title: Khârn: Eater of Worlds
author: anthony-reynolds
description: Khârn the Betrayer is the most feared warrior of Chaos — the chosen of Khorne, driven by an insatiable bloodlust that spares neither friend nor foe. This is his story: a World Eater consumed by the Butcher's Nails, a berserker whose legend is written in the blood of uncountable millions.

title: Lucius: The Faultless Blade
author: ian-st-martin
description: Lucius the Eternal is the greatest swordsman in the galaxy — and the most damned. Blessed and cursed by Slaanesh, he cannot die while those who kill him carry a spark of pride in their victory, for they are doomed to become him. His story is one of perfection pursued to its most monstrous extreme.
